# function: validate_cidr

Accepts a string and returns `true` if it is a valid IPv4 CIDR notation (e.g. `"192.168.0.0/24"`), `false` otherwise.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "map_product" {
  value = provider::functions::map_product(
    {
      privateDns1 = "storage"
      privateDns2 = "webapps"
    },
    {
      vNet1 = "office"
      vNet2 = "field"
    },
    ":"
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
validate_cidr(cidr string) bool
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidr` (String) The string to validate as an IPv4 CIDR notation.
